arts.ttl: Arsenal face race against time to complete crucial transfer
arts.sum: Napoli and Alex Meret are making progress in talks over a contract extension, according to Italian media. At the time, we revealed that it was not yet clear whether Meret, a guaranteed Napoli starter prior to the adductor injury that has now sidelined him, would be willing to join Arsenal to play second fiddle.

arts.ttl: Fresh Howard Webb theory emerges after Premier League statement on Arsenal red card
arts.sum: Former Sky Sports anchor Richard Keys has had his say on conspiracy theories surrounding Howard Webb after Arsenal defender William Saliba saw red at the weekend

arts.ttl: Richard Keys tears into Howard Webb after seeing what he did when William Saliba was sent off for Arsenal
Arsenal vs Shakhtar Donetsk referee left ex-Premier League star furious: 'We are disgusted'
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta's Arsenal side head into Tuesday's match against Shakhtar Donetsk hoping to make it two wins on the trot in the Champions League following their 2-0 victory over PSG

arts.ttl: 'More likely': Charles Watts suggests Arsenal could look at £50m winger to replace Raheem Sterling
Oleksandr Zinchenko says Man City kept him on ‘academy wages’ for three years
arts.sum: Zinchenko opens up on his time at Manchester City in his new book, ‘Believe’

arts.ttl: How to watch Arsenal vs Shakhtar Donetsk - kick-off time, Amazon live stream
arts.sum: Arsenal return to Champions League action this evening as they host Shakhtar Donetsk at the Emirates Stadium. Arsenal vs Shakhtar Donetsk is scheduled to kick off at 8pm on Tuesday, October 22, at the Emirates Stadium.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Shakhtar – Match Preview and Team News
arts.sum: Arsenal welcome Shakhtar Donetsk to North London on Tuesday evening, as they aim to continue the unbeaten start to their Champions League campaign. A 0-0 stalemate away at Atalanta was followed by an assured 2-0 victory over French heavyweights Paris Saint-Germain and another win will put Mikel Arteta’s side in a favourable position to qualify. arts.ttl: Arsenal want six goals in eight games striker that only Erling Haaland is better than
arts.sum: Arsenal are clearly on the lookout for another striker, and the in-form Bryan Mbeumo is being targeted by the North Londoners. Brentford’s on-fire front man is also apparently wanted by Newcastle, and with good reason.
